_comment: Claude Code project config. Put this (as `.mcp.json`) at the root of the project/repo you work in, OR register globally with `claude mcp add`. Replace the absolute paths. On Apple Silicon uv is /opt/homebrew/bin/uv; on Intel it's /usr/local/bin/uv (run `which uv`). The `env` block is OPTIONAL — only needed if you are behind an HTTP proxy for the FIRST run that downloads the `mcp` package.

env._note_optional_proxy: delete this env block unless you are behind a proxy
